name: WNZN Power - New Listener Welcome Sequence

mapper.subject: Welcome to WNZN Power 89.1 — You're Home
mapper.body:
{{1.firstname}},

Welcome to the WNZN Power family.

You're now connected to 89.1 FM — Lorain, Ohio's home for gospel music, inspiration, and community. Whether you found us on the radio, online, or through a friend, we're glad you're here.

A few ways to stay connected:

  • Listen live at WNZN.org anytime, anywhere
  • Download the Power Gospel Network app for on-demand content
  • Follow us on Facebook and Instagram for daily encouragement
  • Join us for live events — we'll keep you posted

If you ever have a prayer request, a song you'd like to hear, or just want to say hello — reach out. This station was built for this community, and you are why we do what we do.

God bless you,

Dr. Mark A. Ballard, Sr.
Founder & CEO, P.A.C.E. Foundation
WNZN Power 89.1 FM | Lorain, Ohio

mapper.text: 👋 *New Listener Signup* — {{1.firstname}} {{1.lastname}} ({{1.email}}) just joined the WNZN Power family via WNZN.org. Welcome email sent. Added to Mailchimp + HubSpot.

mapper.subject: How's your first week with WNZN Power?
mapper.body:
{{1.firstname}},

It's been a week since you joined us — and we just wanted to check in.

If you haven't already, here are a few things worth exploring:

  • Listen live: WNZN.org — 24/7 gospel music and encouragement
  • PGN App: Power Gospel Network — on-demand content, anytime
  • Upcoming events: We host community events throughout the year — watch for your invitation

And if there's anything specific you'd love to hear more of on WNZN Power, reply to this email and let us know. Your voice matters here.

Thank you for being part of what we're building in Lorain, Ohio.

With gratitude,
Dr. Mark A. Ballard, Sr.
WNZN Power 89.1 FM
